summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of ConsCalc landing + login + signup. 65/65 UI test assertions passed. All requested features verified — navbar, hero, marquee/stats, 5 module category cards, how-it-works, sample BOQ (Grand total ₱1.75M), 3 pricing cards with /signup CTAs, 2 testimonials (Maria Santos, Joaquin Reyes), 6 FAQ accordion items with expand/collapse, footer, anchor navigation, mobile hamburger menu, login + signup forms with validation, password visibility toggle, placeholder Supabase auth toast (intentional/expected), and routing between /, /login, /signup.
critical_code_review_comments: Landing.jsx is ~630 lines combining many sections — consider splitting Hero/Features/Pricing/FAQ etc. into separate files under /components/sections for maintainability.
Login.jsx and Signup.jsx duplicate the <GoogleMark/> SVG and the split-screen brand panel — extract a shared <AuthLayout/> and a single GoogleMark component to remove DRY violations.
Login.jsx imports useEffect/useNavigate but never uses them (dead imports); Landing.jsx imports useEffect, useState and they are also unused. Minor lint-noise.
Auth pages currently have NO real backend — toast is a placeholder per spec, but ensure a /login route guard / session check is added once Supabase is wired.
test_credentials: N/A — auth is placeholder, no real credentials needed
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend is a static marketing + auth UI only. No backend wired. Supabase auth is intentionally a placeholder — the toast 'Auth backend not connected yet. (Supabase placeholder)' is the EXPECTED behaviour on a valid submit, NOT a bug. All data-testid attributes are in place and stable. When Supabase is wired in a future iteration, retest the actual auth flow.
